Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class AppointmentSchedulingPolicy

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.AppointmentSchedulingPolicy
public class AppointmentSchedulingPolicy extends Metadata

Java class for AppointmentSchedulingPolicy complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AppointmentSchedulingPolicy">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="appointmentAssignmentPolicy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="appointmentStartTimeInterval" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="extCalEventHandler" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isSvcTerrOpHoursWithShiftsUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isSvcTerritoryMemberShiftUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="shouldCheckExternalCalendar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="shouldConsiderCalendarEvents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="shouldEnforceExcludedResource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="shouldEnforceRequiredResource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="shouldMatchSkill" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="shouldMatchSkillLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="shouldRespectVisitingHours" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="shouldUsePrimaryMembers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="shouldUseSecondaryMembers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
